query:
-- Check S1315 full details including notes and data source
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, provider, monthlyCost, notes, dataSource, 
       serviceCategory, status, customerExternalId
FROM services 
WHERE externalId = 'S1315';

-- Also check all SasBoss services for C0214 to see the cost pattern
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, notes
FROM services
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0214' AND provider = 'SasBoss'
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Check the Revenue & Margin page query - how does it compute per-customer row?
-- Look at what the "Other" service row represents in context
SELECT 
  bi.externalId as billingItem,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount as xeroRevenue,
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost as supplierCost,
  bi.lineAmount - s.monthlyCost as margin,
  ROUND((bi.lineAmount - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(bi.lineAmount, 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
JOIN services s ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1315';
